subtitle.ja: はじめの構えから始めます。左手親指に糸を1周巻き付けます
subtitle.en: Begin with the string looped on both thumbs and little fingers. Wind the string once around the left thumb.

subtitle.ja: 左手親指の輪を、右手親指で下から取ります
subtitle.en: With the right thumb, pick up the left thumb loop from below.

subtitle.ja: 左右の人差し指で、手のひらの糸を取り合います
subtitle.en: With both index fingers, pick up each other’s palm strings.

subtitle.ja: 両手の親指の輪に4本の指を上から入れ、親指手前の2本の糸を取ります。取った糸は手首向こう側に落ちます
subtitle.en: Insert the four fingers of each hand (except the thumbs) from above into the thumb loops, and pick up the two near thumb strings. Let the picked strings fall toward the backs of the wrists.

subtitle.ja: 左右の親指で、人差し指手前から手の甲にかかっている2本の糸を下から取り、糸を手首に落とします
subtitle.en: With both thumbs, pick up from below the two strings that run from the near side of the index fingers across the backs of the hands, and let them fall onto the wrists.

subtitle.ja: 両手親指で人差し指手前の糸を押し下げ、手首向こうの2本の糸を下から取ります
subtitle.en: With both thumbs, press down the near index strings and pick up from below the two strings that run toward the backs of the wrists.

subtitle.ja: 両手首の手前側を繋いでいる1本の糸を掴み、全ての指を越えて手首向こう側に落とします
subtitle.en: Grasp the single string that runs between the near sides of the wrists, lift it up over all the fingers, and let it fall toward the backs of the wrists.

subtitle.ja: 親指の輪に4本の指を上から入れ、親指手前の2本の糸と手首手前の糸を下から取ります。取った糸は手首向こう側に落ちます
subtitle.en: Insert the four fingers of each hand (except the thumbs) from above into the thumb loops, and pick up from below the two near thumb strings and the near wrist string. Let the picked strings fall toward the backs of the wrists.

subtitle.ja: 左右の親指で、人差し指手前の3本の糸を下から取り、糸を手首に落とします
subtitle.en: With both thumbs, pick up from below the three near index strings and let them fall onto the wrists.

subtitle.ja: 左手小指の糸を右手でつまみ、小指を3~4回ねじります。小指の糸を中指に移します
subtitle.en: Pinch the left little-finger string with the right hand, twist the left little finger three or four times, and transfer the little-finger string to the middle finger.

subtitle.ja: 右手小指の糸を左手でつまみ、小指を3~4回ねじります。小指の糸を中指に移します
subtitle.en: Pinch the right little-finger string with the left hand, twist the right little finger three or four times, and transfer the little-finger string to the middle finger.

subtitle.ja: 左右人差し指の糸を外し、手首に落として完成です
subtitle.en: Release the index strings and let them fall onto the wrists to complete the figure.
